title: IconCache.db Forensics: Finding What Users Touched, Even After It's Gone
excerpt: A practical DFIR guide to IconCache.db featuring IconCacheReader — real evidence of VMware shared-folder activity, USB drive browsing, and how to avoid overclaiming execution from path text alone.

title: Hunting BlackBasta: Memory Artifacts and Pre-Encryption Indicators
excerpt: A deep dive into BlackBasta ransomware memory artifacts — pre-encryption indicators, Volatility3 analysis, and YARA rule development.

title: Velociraptor VQL Recipes for Rapid Triage
excerpt: Battle-tested VQL queries for rapid endpoint triage during live IR engagements. Process trees, LOLBins, persistence, and more.

title: Windows Event Log Tampering: Detection & Recovery
excerpt: How attackers clear and tamper with Windows event logs, and the forensic artifacts that remain — from prefetch to shadow copies.
